Settings hero subtitle: Make Roblox things feel right again.
Search developer unlocked hint: Developer page unlocked. It is highly recommended not to use it because it is mostly useless.
Old navigation description: In development. Keep disabled unless you are testing it.
Sidebar size description: Drag freely, then release to snap to the nearest mode.
Always show close description: Forces Roblox's sidebar close/menu button to always be visible.
Friend styling description: Restyles the friends carousel with a dark glass card and animated presence ring glow.
Info card body: This extension adds an RoPrime settings panel on your Roblox Account page and can rename some modern Roblox wording back to classic terms.
Developer section description: This page is hidden by default. It is highly recommended not to use it because it is mostly useless.
Welcome step before: Click the gear icon in the Roblox header, then open
